name: Whey Gold
description: Unlock your peak form with our premium Whey Gold. Sourced from the highest quality dairy, this fast-absorbing protein blend rapidly delivers essential amino acids to fuel muscle recovery and growth.
usage: Mix 1 scoop with 200-250ml of cold water or milk. Consume post-workout or as needed.

reviews.name: Alex M.
reviews.comment: I've been using this for 3 months now and the gains have been fantastic. Mixes perfectly without any clumps and tastes amazing compared to other premium brands.

reviews.name: Chris L.
reviews.comment: Does exactly what it says. Good stuff but slightly pricey. Still worth it for the quality.

reviews.name: John P.
reviews.comment: Best supplement I have ever purchased. Highly recommended to anyone serious about their physique.
